input.question: Is there a correlation between difficulty rating and average grade per course?

payload.question: Is there a correlation between difficulty rating and average grade per course?

output.sql:
WITH course_avg AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS course_id,
    c.name AS course_name,
    c.difficulty_rating AS difficulty_rating,
    AVG(g.grade) AS avg_grade,
    COUNT(g.grade) AS n_grades
  FROM courses AS c
  JOIN grades AS g ON g.course_id = c.id
  GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.difficulty_rating
)
SELECT
  course_id,
  course_name,
  difficulty_rating,
  avg_grade,
  n_grades
FROM course_avg
ORDER BY difficulty_rating ASC;

visualization.title: Average Grade vs Difficulty Rating per Course

payload.sql:
WITH course_avg AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS course_id,
    c.name AS course_name,
    c.difficulty_rating AS difficulty_rating,
    AVG(g.grade) AS avg_grade,
    COUNT(g.grade) AS n_grades
  FROM courses AS c
  JOIN grades AS g ON g.course_id = c.id
  GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.difficulty_rating
)
SELECT
  course_id,
  course_name,
  difficulty_rating,
  avg_grade,
  n_grades
FROM course_avg
ORDER BY difficulty_rating ASC;
